headline: Jeff McElfresh to Update Shareholders at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference on March 3
summary: Jeff McElfresh, Chief Operating Officer, AT&T (NYSE:T), will speak tomorrow at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference where he will provide an update to shareholders.

headline: At&T Reiterates 2026 And Multi-Year Financial Guidance
summary: AT&T remains on track to achieve its 2026 and multi-year financial guidanceAT&T reiterates all full-year 2026 and multi-year financial guidance and capital return plans provided with its fourth-quarter 2025

headline: AT&T Balances Open Source Telecom AI Push With Governance Scrutiny
summary: AT&T (NYSE:T) has joined the Linux Foundation's new OCUDU Ecosystem Foundation as a founding member to support open source telecom software. The company is also a founding participant in GSMA's Open Telco AI initiative focused on AI driven 5G and future 6G network capabilities. Separately, AT&T reached a settlement with New York City pension funds following a lawsuit over its handling of shareholder proposal disclosures. These technology and governance developments arrive as AT&T's shares...

headline: Tutor Perini celebrates ‘best year ever,’ return to profitability in 2025
summary: The megaproject contractor said it won nine projects valued at a cumulative $16 billion in the last three years and has resumed work on New York City’s Gateway Project.

raw.headline: Tutor Perini celebrates ‘best year ever,’ return to profitability in 2025
raw.summary: The megaproject contractor said it won nine projects valued at a cumulative $16 billion in the last three years and has resumed work on New York City’s Gateway Project.

headline: Middle East fighting overshadows world telecom show
summary: Fighting over Iran impacted the start on Monday of the Mobile World Congress (MWC) telecoms trade fair thousands of miles away in Barcelona, with Israeli firms absent and activists demonstrating for a boycott of the country's pavilion.Around 30 demonstrators had earlier gathered at the entrance to the vast congress centre, shouting: "Boycott Israel, boycott USA" and shadowed by several police officers.

headline: Paramount to combine HBO Max and Paramount+ into one streaming service after WBD merger
summary: Paramount said it plans to merge HBO Max and Paramount+ into one streaming service after completing its WBD acquisition.

headline: GSMA launches Open Telco AI to accelerate development of telco‑grade AI
summary: GSMA today launched Open Telco AI, a global industry initiative designed to accelerate telco-grade AI through open collaboration across operators, vendors, AI developers and academic institutions. The launch introduces a new portal for telco open models, data, compute and tools to accelerate the development and evaluation of telco-focused AI models, accessed via GSMA.com/open-telco-ai.
